news.t: Muni Bond Investors: Let's Talk TAXF

overview.description: The American Century Diversified Municipal Bond ETF (TAXF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US municipal bonds. The fund seeks current income that is exempt from federal taxes. TAXF was launched on Sep 10, 2018 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: Inside American Century's $128B ETF Surge
data.text: American Century Investments has established itself as an innovative player in the ETF space, after launching its first products in January 2018. The index-based American Century US Quality Value ETF ...

data.title: Muni Bond Investors: Let's Talk TAXF
data.text: Like other corners of the fixed income market, municipal bonds didn't set the investing world ablaze in the first quarter. Some market observers believe there's no opportunity in the asset class often...
